# Anduril’s Lattice Showcased in U.S. Central Command’s Desert Guardian 1.0

Anduril Industries is proud to announce the successful integration of its Lattice platform in U.S. Central Command's (CENTCOM) Desert Guardian exercise, a critical event designed to address the increasing complexity of modern airspace and the growing threat posed by unmanned aerial systems (UAS).
